docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN, ADAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, TONI AN INDIVIDUAL DBA GUTIERREZ BROTHERS BODY SHOP $5,671.31 PRINCIPAL, $22.75 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,919.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
